common.description: Experience the rich flavors of India at Kumar Restaurant, located in the heart of Hamamatsu, Japan. Our dishes are prepared with traditional recipes and the finest spices.
common.address: 430-7790 Shizuoka, Hamamatsu, Naka Ward, Itayamachi, Act Tower B1
common.secondAddress: 432-0041 Hamamatsu, Kita-ku, Higashiguchi 2861, Sun Street Hamakita 1F

hero.subtitle: Home of Indian tradition and exquisite preparation
hero.description: From aromatic curries to freshly baked naan, every dish tells a story of tradition and passion.

about.title: About Kumar
about.subtitle: Our story of passion and tradition

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Kumar Restaurant was founded with a simple mission: to bring the authentic flavors of India to Hamamatsu. Our journey began with a passion for traditional Indian cuisine and a desire to share it with the local community.

dineIn.title: Dine-In
dineIn.description: Enjoy authentic Indian cuisine in our warm and inviting restaurant. Lunch and dinner service available.

takeaway.title: Takeaway
takeaway.description: Take the flavors of India home with you. Call ahead for quick pickup.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: We deliver hot, fresh Indian food right to your door. Order via phone or WhatsApp.

catering.title: Catering
catering.description: Make your event special with our Indian catering services. Corporate events, parties, and celebrations.

wedding.title: Wedding Planning
wedding.description: Dream of a traditional Indian wedding? We help plan and host beautiful Indian wedding ceremonies.

dietary.title: Dietary Options
dietary.description: Vegetarian, Vegan, Halal, Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Nut-Free — we cater to all dietary needs.

catering.title: Catering
catering.description: Professional catering services for events of all sizes.

boxLunch.title: Box Lunch
